title: Car Plows Into Pedestrians in Northern Italian Town, Injuring at Least 8
summary_full: Four of the injured were in serious condition, the mayor of Modena said, praising residents who rushed to stop the car’s driver from escaping on foot.
summary_public: Four of the injured were in serious condition, the mayor of Modena said, praising residents who rushed to stop the car’s driver from escaping on foot.
